FuelCell Energy Collaborates With KHNP To Tackle South Korea's Hydrogen Supply Needs
data.description: FuelCell Energy and Korea Hydro & Nuclear Power signed an MOU to collaborate on hydrogen energy solutions using FCEL's technology and KHNP's nuclear plants, aiming to diversify South Korea's hydrogen supply.
